name: Sigewinne
desc:
"Wondrous Dragonheir" Sigewinne

"Pure spirit, heed my wish."

string_values: Reward for inviting Sigewinne to a duel at The Cat's Tail and claiming victory in a Friendly Fracas with her

list.desc:
Elemental Skill

Create 1 Large Bolstering Bubblebalm and insert as the third card from the top of your deck. This character gains 3 stacks of Bond of Life. (After the Large Bolstering Bubblebalm effect is triggered, create a Medium Bolstering Bubblebalm and place in your opponent's deck. After the Medium Bolstering Bubblebalm effect is triggered, create a Small Bolstering Bubblebalm and place in your deck.)

Bond of Life

Status
When the character to which this is attached is healed: This effect will be consumed once for every Usage(s) it has to negate 1 HP of healing received. (Cannot negate revives or healing caused by redistribution of HP)
Usage(s): 1 (Can stack, no stack limit).
list.title: Rebound Hydrotherapy

list.desc:
Elemental Burst

Deals 2 Hydro DMG, then performs "Prepare Skill" for Medical Intervention of Pure Intention.

Medical Intervention of Pure Intention
Elemental Burst
Deals 2 Hydro DMG.
list.title: Super Saturated Syringing

list.desc:
Passive

(Passive) When your character is healed, after causing the Bond of Life attached to them to be completely removed, this character gains 1 extra Max HP. (Up to 3 times per character)
When you switch to this character: If your side has Sourcewater Droplet, -1 to their Usage(s), and this character gains 1 Energy.

Bond of Life

Status
When the character to which this is attached is healed: This effect will be consumed once for every Usage(s) it has to negate 1 HP of healing received. (Cannot negate revives or healing caused by redistribution of HP)
Usage(s): 1 (Can stack, no stack limit).

Sourcewater Droplet

Combat Status
After Neuvillette uses a Normal Attack: Heals the character for 2 HP. After this, Prepare Skill: Equitable Judgment.
Usage(s): 1 (Can stack. Max 3 stacks.)
list.title: Detailed Diagnosis, Thorough Treatment

list.desc:
Event Card

When this card is drawn: Heal your active character for 3 HP. Create 1 Medium Bolstering Bubblebalm and insert it as the second card from the top of your opponent's deck.
list.title: Large Bolstering Bubblebalm

list.desc:
Event Card

When this card is drawn: Deals 2 Hydro DMG to the active character on the side of the field this card is on. Create 1 Small Bolstering Bubblebalm and place it at the top of your opponent's deck.
list.title: Medium Bolstering Bubblebalm

list.desc:
Event Card

When this card is drawn: Heal all your characters for 1 HP. Create Sourcewater Droplet.
list.title: Small Bolstering Bubblebalm

list.desc:
Applies Hydro and can trigger the following Elemental Reactions:

[Hydro + Pyro] Vaporize: DMG +2 for this instance

[Hydro + Electro] Electro-Charged: DMG +1 for this instance, deal 1 Piercing DMG to all opposing characters except the target

[Hydro + Cryo] Frozen: DMG +1 for this instance, the target is unable to perform any Actions this Round (Can be removed in advance after the target receives +2 Physical or Pyro DMG)

[Hydro + Dendro] Bloom: DMG +1 for this instance, creates a [Dendro Core] that grants +2 DMG to the next instance of Pyro or Electro DMG
list.title: Hydro DMG

list.desc:
Physical DMG
Physical DMG will not apply any Elements, nor can it engage in Elemental Reactions.

Usage(s)
After this card's effect is triggered, 1 Usage of it will be consumed.
This card will be discarded immediately once it has 0 Usages remaining.

Prepare Skill
Some Skills cannot be used directly. Instead, they need to be prepared over a certain number of turns.
When it is a certain player's turn, and this player's active character is currently preparing a Skill, this player's turn will be skipped. If the Skill has finished being prepared, the character will directly use that Skill at this time. (Skills that require preparing cannot activate effects triggered by "using a Skill" or "triggering an Elemental Reaction" or other such effects.)
Only active characters can prepare Skills, and if an active character who is preparing a Skill gets switched off-field, their preparation will be interrupted.

Energy
Characters must consume Energy to use their Elemental Bursts.
When characters use an Elemental Skill or a Normal Attack, they will gain 1 Energy.
list.title: Detailed Rules

content.text: Can also be exchanged using a
"Playing cards with a carefree mindset does wonders for your mood!"
Hint: Sigewinne's deck centers around Healing and Bond of Life. Once she heals your characters and clears Bond of Life, your characters will gain a boost to their Max HP.
Achieve victory with characters defeated less than twice during the battle
"Wow, you're amazing! If you get the chance, you wouldn't be able to stop by the Fortress of Meropide for a game of cards with me and my patients, would you?"
Special Rule: "Sigewinne" starts with the Talent Card "Requires Appropriate Rest" equipped.
Complete 3 challenge objective(s) in Sigewinne: Friendly
"Playing cards with a carefree mindset does wonders for your mood!"
Hint: Sigewinne's deck centers around Healing and Bond of Life. Once she heals your characters and clears Bond of Life, your characters will gain a boost to their Max HP.
